findings.evidence: rg hit: line 155 docstring; line 157 signature `theorem swapRows_swapRows (a b : Fin n) ... : (x.swapRows a b).swapRows a b = x`.
findings.fix: Change it to "Swapping the same pair of rows twice is the identity on grid states."
findings.issue: The docstring says "Swapping the same row twice", but `swapRows_swapRows` swaps the same pair `a b` twice, not a single row.

findings.evidence: rg hit: line 162 docstring; line 164 signature `theorem swapColumns_swapColumns (a b : Fin n) ... : (x.swapColumns a b).swapColumns a b = x`.
findings.fix: Change it to "Swapping the same pair of columns twice is the identity on grid states."
findings.issue: The docstring says "Swapping the same column twice", but `swapColumns_swapColumns` swaps the same pair `a b` twice, not a single column.

summary: The added file has a useful module docstring and documents the public API, but two GridState theorem docstrings describe the wrong operation.
